creator: albert.kinderman@csun.edu
text:
Trying to make mc-4.5.54 with mcedit 

make -DWITH_SLANG

fails with   *** No rule to make target '../edit/libedit.a' needed by `mc'
in directory usr/ports/misc/mc/work/mc-4.5.54/src

libedit.a is neither in src nor in edit, as it was in 4.5.51 (the last version I made
with mcedit).

I have gettext-0.10.35. libslang-1.4.4_1, and ispell-3.1.20c_2  installed

make (using ncurses) makes correctly

How-To-Repeat: make -DWITH_SLANG
